Response 218744382

Awarded $488,750 in Additional Funding to Conduct An Internship Program for Students

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Awarded $488,750 in additional funding to conduct an internship program for students at ASU and MCCCD to obtain experiential learning and job skills during the summer of 2026.
